title: Your 12 Subscriptions Are Stealing $265,000 From You
hook: You can name 4 of your subscriptions. The other 8 are quietly wrecking your retirement.
angle: Subscription blindness + compound opportunity cost: $14.99/month feels painless but costs $265K over 30 years
audience: Millennials and Gen Z with multiple streaming/app subscriptions who underestimate the total cost
